title: Amroha Heat Wave
lead: Amroha is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +5.77. The city's heat wave has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Amroha has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 19.2 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 29%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is at 13.2 km/h. 
 The Heat Wave has a significant impact on the city's infrastructure and daily life, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately
